title: AI GTA Loading Screen
description: Turns the photo into high-contrast GTA-style loading screen vector art.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a satirical open-world crime-game loading-screen illustration. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identities, key facial features, pose, camera angle, and outfit. Apply a high-contrast vector illustration style with clean bold black ink outlines, smooth color shading, and dynamic lighting. The background should feature a stylized warm sunset cityscape with palm tree silhouettes, without logos or game UI.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, photorealism, realistic textures, oil painting, pencil sketch, low contrast, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. sunset city background, high contrast shadows...
